pet_notes: Haneoka Meimi in the same approved non-pixel chibi anime pet style. Use the meimi-pink-pinafore base for character shape, body proportions, face scale, full-body stance, and overall pet readability. Use the meimi-striped-shortalls canonical base for the accurate Meimi hair: warm orange-red long hair and special hime-style side locks with narrow roots close to the cheeks and blunt even ends. New outfit from the provided reference: white short-sleeve top with small collar or simple neckline, black suspenders/black side strap panels, and a white short skirt. No hat, no bag, no props.
style_notes: Non-pixel Q-version 1990s shoujo anime pet, smooth cel shading, crisp dark outline, compact readable full-body sprite on chroma key. Preserve Meimi face, proportions, orange-red hair color, and the distinctive narrow-root blunt side locks.
style_contract: Pet-safe sprite: compact full-body mascot, readable in a 192x208 cell, clear silhouette, simple face, stable palette/materials, and crisp edges for chroma-key extraction. Style `auto`: Infer the most appropriate pet-safe style from the user request and reference images, then keep that exact style consistent across every row. User style notes: Non-pixel Q-version 1990s shoujo anime pet, smooth cel shading, crisp dark outline, compact readable full-body sprite on chroma key. Preserve Meimi face, proportions, orange-red hair color, and the distinctive narrow-root blunt side locks..
pet_safe_style: Pet-safe sprite: compact full-body mascot, readable in a 192x208 cell, clear silhouette, simple face, stable palette/materials, and crisp edges for chroma-key extraction.
